summary: EXP-437 authored — count drift fix via Approach (a) name-the-denominator. Adds two placeholders ({{CATALOG_TOTAL}}=72, {{COLLISION_COUNT}}=2) to build-scripts/generate-html.js, patches 5 prose locations where TALLY_* (sums to 72) was divided by TOTAL_WINS=70 (arithmetically wrong — worst offender TALLY_STD=18/70 because 057b is in numerator but not denominator), and inserts one explanatory <details> block in the Overview reconciling the two numbers. Preserves 39 other dome-frame {{TOTAL_WINS}} mentions where 70 is correct (dome's own quoted framing, code-analysis denominators which are also baseWins-derived, V51.0 accuracy formula). Includes build-time sanity check (baseWins + collisions == wins.length) to fail loudly if a future ID-shape is unmatched. Tracker entry EXP-437 flipped to ready-for-integration. Also drained EXP-445 (ISS-2254) as superseded — operator closed that issue wontfix on 2026-05-29.
